pageContext.name: Space Wolves Thunderwolf Cavalry Bjane
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Space Wolves Thunderwolf Cavalry Bjane Collectible Set!  A small, elite unit of the Space Wolves, the Thunderwolf Cavalry, are a near-mythical presence; decorated and proud warriors rumored to have ridden massive Fenrisian Thunderwolves into Battle. Captured here in highly detailed 1:18 scale form, this set features Cavalry Bjane and his mighty Thunderwolf, along with an array of weapons and armor.  Ride into battle and add this incredible set to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
